---
title: "The Whole Game Practice"
subtitle: "My First Github Push"
author: Elyse Vetter
date: 2026-06-24
image: "https://github.com/bhelsel/2026-RLAB-Practical-Exercises/raw/main/images/rlab-placeholder.png"
execute: 
  echo: true
  eval: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

**Assignment**. Practice for Dr. Julianne Clina's introduction to R presentation. 
This Quarto document will be used to practice my first GitHub pull request.

```{r}

# Hello R-LAB
message("My first GitHub push worked!")
x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```

## Introduction to dplyr

```{r}

library(dplyr)

starwars |>
  mutate(name, bmi = mass / ((height / 100)^2)) |>
  select(name:mass, bmi)
```

## Introduction to ggplot2

```{r}

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mpg, aes(displ, hwy, colour = class)) +
  geom_point()
```
